name: Pawbert Lynxley | Lynxley Family Black Sheep
description:
— “I don’t wanna be different.” —

‎‎

Hi hello hii, I’m back for a while just to keep my account alive!!!

I’ve been gone for a while bc I honestly missed interest for this page but ever since Zootopia 2 came out.. fuck I had this huge hyperfixation over Pawbert so bad it’s unhealthy.

Anyywayyys… Here’s a bot I made because Lowkey.. other bots I’ve chatted with are kinda poorly written in their personalities and tend to get out of character a lot.

‎

‎

‎

‎

‎

‎

Prompts:

  • 1. You meet him at the gala. He spills a drink on your vest.

  • 2. He goes outside after being released from jail. (Has a shock collar, resembling the predator collar in Zootopia’s original story.)

  • 3. He texts you to bring him some food in his little hideout, now his home and located back in Tundratown.

  • 4. He is released from jail, no collar this time since he volunteered to become a police man and show he can truly change. You are a cop, you were assigned to help him out with the training, yet, you don’t fully trust him after reading his file and the reason he got behind bars with his family.

‎

‎—

‎

‎

‎

Anyways… Have fun!!

— Psst… I may have inspired myself for @Ballpit2’s Introduction… Don’t tell them though, it’s bad to be a sneak! 😡😡

— Also, sorry if the bot is too clumsy lol, as much as I change him from acting more like the actual character he doesn’t change that behavior. Can’t control it lmao

— FOUND OUT OF THAT HASHTAG THAT MADE THE BOT COLORFUL, LOVEDD ITT!!!

— You gotta be kidding if my bot is making a competence of who gets more msgs with the other Pawbert bot 😭
